project: ModRun Cable Management System — Post-Test-Print Launch Package
notes: All phases run from test print confirmation (Day 0). Phases 2-5 run in parallel during Days 1-10. Phase 6 is launch day. Phase 7 is ongoing operations.

test_print_must_pass: Clip engagement width within ±0.5mm of CAD spec
Rail channel width within ±0.5mm of CAD spec
Clip-to-rail mechanical fit: snap engages cleanly, releases cleanly
No warping exceeding 1mm at any edge
Cable channel accepts 3-10mm cables without binding
Surface finish acceptable for commercial sale
test_print_fails_if: Clip-to-rail fit fails (too tight or too loose)

phases.description: Evaluate test print against go/no-go criteria. 1-2 hours total.

tasks.task: Run test print on Bambu P1S (modrun_clip and modrun_rail)
tasks.success_criteria: Print completes without manual intervention, no failed layers

tasks.task: Measure clip engagement width with digital calipers (±0.5mm tolerance)
tasks.success_criteria: Measurement within ±0.5mm of CAD spec

tasks.task: Measure rail channel width with calipers (±0.5mm tolerance)
tasks.success_criteria: Measurement within ±0.5mm of CAD spec

tasks.task: Test clip-to-rail mechanical fit (snap engagement, 5-cycle test)
tasks.success_criteria: Clip snaps onto rail and releases cleanly in 5+ cycles without fatigue cracking

tasks.task: Visual QA: inspect for layer delamination, warping, surface finish
tasks.success_criteria: No delamination, warping <1mm, surface finish commercially acceptable

tasks.task: Document results and make go/no-go decision
tasks.success_criteria: All criteria pass → proceed to Phase 2-5 (parallel). Any fail → document failure, adjust, reprint.

phases.description: Legal, banking, insurance, tax setup. Start all items Day 1 due to external processing waits.
phases.go_no_go_criteria: All items complete before listing goes live (Day 10)

tasks.task: Decide business entity type (LLC vs. sole proprietor)
tasks.success_criteria: Entity type decided; consult CPA/attorney if uncertain

tasks.task: Apply for EIN (Employer Identification Number) at irs.gov/ein
tasks.success_criteria: EIN number obtained and stored; takes 10 minutes, free, instant

tasks.task: File LLC formation with Secretary of State (if LLC path chosen)
tasks.success_criteria: Articles of Organization submitted; processing time 1-4 weeks (state-dependent)

tasks.task: Check home occupation permit requirements for your municipality
tasks.success_criteria: Permit obtained or confirmed not required for low-impact home 3D printing

tasks.task: Open business checking account (Mercury, Chase Business, or existing bank)
tasks.success_criteria: Business account open, separate from personal finances, routing/account numbers recorded

tasks.task: Apply for product liability insurance ($1M occurrence policy)
tasks.success_criteria: Policy active before first Etsy listing goes live; expected cost $300-600/year

tasks.task: Set up bookkeeping: Craftybase ($49/month) OR Google Sheets (free)
tasks.success_criteria: Bookkeeping system ready to receive first order; Craftybase recommended at 20+ orders/month

tasks.task: Order business debit card (for supplier purchases, keeps records clean)
tasks.success_criteria: Business debit card ordered; arrives within 5-7 business days

tasks.task: Create product photography setup (white background, ring light or window light)
tasks.success_criteria: Photography setup ready; white poster board background + adequate lighting

tasks.task: Confirm Etsy original design compliance (ModRun = CadQuery original design, fully compliant with June 2025 rules)
tasks.success_criteria: CadQuery source files serve as design provenance; do NOT sell prints of third-party STL files

phases.description: Full Etsy store setup: account, settings, payments, shipping, policies. Complete before listing upload.
phases.go_no_go_criteria: All items complete before any listing is published

tasks.task: Create Etsy seller account (or convert existing buyer account)
tasks.success_criteria: Etsy seller account created with business email

tasks.task: Set shop name: 'ModRun Design' or 'ModRun Studio' — lock in immediately
tasks.success_criteria: Shop name locked; cannot be changed without creating new shop

tasks.task: Complete shop basic settings (announcement, icon, location, operating hours)
tasks.success_criteria: All basic fields filled; processing time set to 2 business days

tasks.task: Create 3 shop sections: ModRun Essentials / ModRun Pro / ModRun Professional
tasks.success_criteria: 3 sections created and named; helps customers navigate and supports SEO

tasks.task: Connect business bank account to Etsy Payments (routing + account number)
tasks.success_criteria: Bank account linked; 2-3 day verification wait (micro-deposits)

tasks.task: Submit tax identification form (W-9) with EIN
tasks.success_criteria: Tax ID submitted in Etsy Payments settings; required for Etsy 1099-K

tasks.task: Confirm Etsy Managed Payments is enabled (default for US shops)
tasks.success_criteria: Managed Payments active; includes PayPal + credit card at 3% + $0.25/transaction

tasks.task: Create Standard Domestic shipping profile (USPS Ground Advantage, calculated shipping)
tasks.success_criteria: Profile created with 2-business-day processing, calculated weight-based USPS rates

tasks.task: Create Express Domestic shipping profile (USPS Priority Mail, optional premium)
tasks.success_criteria: Priority Mail profile created; offered as optional upgrade at checkout

tasks.task: Configure return policy (30-day satisfaction guarantee, seller pays return shipping)
tasks.success_criteria: 30-day return policy active; seller pays for return labels; reduces buyer hesitation

tasks.task: Write and publish About page (brand story, original design, satisfaction guarantee)
tasks.success_criteria: About page published with clear brand story and ModRun original design positioning

tasks.task: Write and publish Terms of Service (IP ownership, liability limitations)
tasks.success_criteria: Terms published; customer owns physical item, not design rights

tasks.task: Write and publish Privacy Policy (data collection, retention, GDPR basics)
tasks.success_criteria: Privacy policy published; Etsy template acceptable as baseline

tasks.task: Design and upload shop banner (3360x840px, Canva free tier)
tasks.success_criteria: Banner uploaded with product imagery and tagline; professional appearance

tasks.task: Upload shop profile image / icon (500x500px, product photo or logo)
tasks.success_criteria: Profile image uploaded; recognizable at small thumbnail size

tasks.task: Test bank account verification (confirm 2 micro-deposits received and entered)
tasks.success_criteria: Bank account verified in Etsy Payments; required before first payout

phases.description: Product photography, descriptions, SEO tags, pricing — upload all in draft, review before publishing.
phases.go_no_go_criteria: All 5 listings reviewed, margin verified, photos approved before publishing

tasks.task: Photograph all 5 SKUs: hero shot (white background) + 4 additional photos each
tasks.success_criteria: 5 photos per product minimum; hero + context + detail + lifestyle + variants; 2048x2048px

tasks.task: Edit photos: remove background, adjust brightness/contrast, confirm 2048x2048px
tasks.success_criteria: Photos clean, consistent white background, professionally lit; no watermarks

tasks.task: Research SEO tags for all 5 listings using eRank (free tier)
tasks.success_criteria: 13 tags per listing; tags verified with 10K+ monthly searches and <5K listings

tasks.task: Write product title for each listing (<140 characters, keyword-rich, no caps-spam)
tasks.success_criteria: All 5 titles drafted; primary keyword in first 40 characters

tasks.task: Write product description for each listing (1,500+ characters, features + use cases + warranty)
tasks.success_criteria: All 5 descriptions drafted; covers specs, materials, installation, warranty, shipping

tasks.task: Set pricing for all 5 SKUs (cross-check against pricing-tiers.csv, verify ≥54% gross margin)
tasks.success_criteria: All prices set; Economy ≥54%, Standard ≥60%, Premium ≥63%; pricing-tiers.csv is the reference

tasks.task: Configure product variants: Material (PLA/PETG) + Color (Black/White/Grey) per listing
tasks.success_criteria: Variants configured; PLA base price, PETG +$2-3 premium; all 3 colors available

tasks.task: Set conservative launch inventory quantities (Economy: 15 units, Standard: 20, Premium: 5)
tasks.success_criteria: Inventory quantities set to match actual printed stock; no overselling

tasks.task: Upload all photos to each listing (minimum 2, target 5)
tasks.success_criteria: Photos uploaded to each listing; first photo is hero/thumbnail shot

tasks.task: Enter 13 tags per listing (from eRank research)
tasks.success_criteria: All 13 tag slots used per listing; high-volume, low-competition terms prioritized

tasks.task: Assign shipping profile (Standard Domestic) to all listings
tasks.success_criteria: Standard Domestic shipping profile applied to all 5 listings

tasks.task: Assign listings to correct shop sections (Essentials / Pro / Professional)
tasks.success_criteria: Each listing assigned to its tier section for shop navigation

tasks.task: Final review of all 5 listings in draft: spelling, pricing, photos, tags
tasks.success_criteria: No errors; all margins confirmed; all photos load correctly; ready to publish

tasks.task: Create Etsy sale/announcement for launch (optional: 10% off first 30 days to drive early reviews)
tasks.success_criteria: Launch promotion configured (if using); discount code ready or sale pricing set

phases.description: Print initial inventory, set up shipping infrastructure, conduct supplier outreach.
phases.go_no_go_criteria: 40+ units printed and QC'd; packaging materials received; Pirate Ship account ready; supplier outreach sent

tasks.task: Set up Pirate Ship account (free) and connect Etsy store integration
tasks.success_criteria: Pirate Ship account created; Etsy store connected; test label generation confirmed

tasks.task: Order packaging materials: poly mailers 9x12 (500 units), packing tape, postal scale
tasks.success_criteria: Order placed; materials arrive before first order ships (estimate 3-5 days)

tasks.task: Purchase digital calipers for QA dimensional checks (±0.01mm precision)
tasks.success_criteria: Calipers received; validated on reference object before production use

tasks.task: Print initial inventory: 40-50 units (black PLA priority: 20 clips, 8 rails, 10 premium clips, 4 kits)
tasks.success_criteria: 40-50 units printed, QC passed, organized by SKU on labeled shelf

tasks.task: Validate QA checklist against first production batch (all 10 visual and dimensional criteria)
tasks.success_criteria: QA process validated; scrap rate <5%; dimensional checks passing

tasks.task: Organize finished goods storage (labeled shelves by SKU and color, scrap bin)
tasks.success_criteria: All units shelved by SKU; quick visual scan shows stock levels; SCRAP bin labeled

tasks.task: Create print queue tracking spreadsheet (Google Sheets, all columns as per fulfillment-workflow.md)
tasks.success_criteria: Spreadsheet ready with all columns; test entry with one sample order

tasks.task: Verify eSUN Amazon pricing (ASIN B0G2KSS613) — confirm current $/kg
tasks.success_criteria: Current eSUN price confirmed; compare to $13/kg target; document in supplier tracker

tasks.task: Verify Anycubic 50kg pallet pricing at store.anycubic.com
tasks.success_criteria: Current Anycubic price confirmed; compare to $10.49/kg target; document

tasks.task: Select supplier negotiation path (Path A/B/C per supplier-negotiation-playbook.md Step 2)
tasks.success_criteria: Path selected; documented in supplier tracker

tasks.task: Send eSUN wholesale inquiry email (if Path B or C)
tasks.success_criteria: Email sent using template from supplier-negotiation-playbook.md Step 3; response expected in 2-3 weeks

tasks.task: Contact Anycubic for 50kg pallet pre-qualification (sample or direct order inquiry)
tasks.success_criteria: Anycubic contacted using template from playbook Step 4; response expected in 2-5 days

tasks.task: Set up Craftybase account and connect Etsy (if proceeding with $49/month plan)
tasks.success_criteria: Craftybase connected to Etsy; materials and recipes defined; first order test sync verified

tasks.task: Organize STL files in ModRun_STLs/ folder with naming convention and README
tasks.success_criteria: Files named per modrun_[component]_[variant]_v1.0.stl convention; README complete; CC-BY-NC 4.0 license applied

tasks.task: Upload STL files to GitHub repository (modrun-cable-clips)
tasks.success_criteria: GitHub repo public; all STL files and print settings documentation uploaded

tasks.task: Confirm print settings documentation (PrintSettings.md) complete and validated
tasks.success_criteria: PLA and PETG settings documented with validated production parameters from test print

phases.description: Simultaneous publish of all listings, launch announcement, first-day monitoring.
phases.go_no_go_criteria: All prior phases complete before publishing any listing

tasks.task: Final pre-launch checklist: all Phase 2-5 items confirmed complete
tasks.success_criteria: Insurance active, bank verified, inventory stocked, all listings reviewed

tasks.task: Publish all 5 listings simultaneously (click Publish on each)
tasks.success_criteria: All 5 listings live on Etsy; shop visible in search within 15-30 minutes

tasks.task: Confirm shop is live: search Etsy for 'ModRun' — all products visible
tasks.success_criteria: All 5 products appear in Etsy search; photos and prices display correctly

tasks.task: Test purchase flow: add item to cart as customer, verify shipping calculates correctly
tasks.success_criteria: Can complete checkout flow; shipping cost is reasonable; payment methods display

tasks.task: Post launch announcement (social media, personal network, any email contacts)
tasks.success_criteria: Launch announced; Etsy shop URL shared; at least 10 people aware

tasks.task: Monitor first 4 hours: check Etsy Stats (views, clicks); respond to any messages immediately
tasks.success_criteria: No technical errors; at least 10 views in first 4 hours; any messages answered

tasks.task: Monitor first 24 hours: track traffic, verify shipping calculations on any orders
tasks.success_criteria: Shop running without technical issues; first sales expected Day 1-7

phases.timeline: Week 2 onward — daily and weekly cadence
phases.description: Daily print-ship cycle, weekly KPI review, supplier follow-up, scaling decisions.

tasks.task: DAILY: Check Etsy orders (email) + add to print queue spreadsheet
tasks.success_criteria: All orders added to queue same day received; print job scheduled for next morning

tasks.task: DAILY: Print orders (batch by color/material, plate-maximize)
tasks.success_criteria: All queued orders printed; batch QC log updated; defect rate tracked

tasks.task: DAILY: QA check (visual + dimensional spot-check per batch)
tasks.success_criteria: All units QC'd before packaging; defects rejected and requeued

tasks.task: DAILY: Package orders (poly mailer, tissue paper, thank-you card)
tasks.success_criteria: All QC-passed units packaged; weight recorded for each package

tasks.task: DAILY: Generate Pirate Ship labels (import from Etsy, purchase labels, print)
tasks.success_criteria: Labels generated and applied; packages ready for USPS dropoff

tasks.task: DAILY: Drop packages at USPS (or schedule pickup) and mark as shipped in Etsy
tasks.success_criteria: Packages in USPS system; tracking numbers entered in Etsy; customers notified

tasks.task: DAILY: Check and respond to Etsy messages within 4 hours (or by 8 AM next morning)
tasks.success_criteria: All messages answered within 24 hours; professional tone; resolve issues proactively

tasks.task: DAILY: Morning inventory count (2-minute shelf check; trigger reprints if below reorder level)
tasks.success_criteria: Inventory tracked; reorder trigger fired when any SKU below 14-day supply threshold

tasks.task: WEEKLY: Review Etsy shop analytics (views, conversion rate, top SKUs, traffic sources)
tasks.success_criteria: Conversion rate calculated (visits/orders); underperforming listings identified for tag/photo improvement

tasks.task: WEEKLY: Update print queue tracking spreadsheet with actuals (times, defect rates)
tasks.success_criteria: Actual vs. projected print times logged; defect rates calculated weekly

tasks.task: Week 2-3: Follow up on eSUN wholesale inquiry if no response in 10 days
tasks.success_criteria: Follow-up sent; if no response by Day 21, conclude eSUN wholesale deferred to Month 2

tasks.task: Week 2: Evaluate Anycubic response and decide on sample order or 50kg pallet
tasks.success_criteria: Anycubic path decided; sample order placed if quality validation needed; 50kg ordered if confident

phases.description: Etsy SEO optimization, social media presence, review generation, promotional strategy.

tasks.task: Create Etsy shop announcement promotion (e.g., 'Free design consultation on orders $50+')
tasks.success_criteria: Promotion announcement visible on shop homepage; drives email signups or AOV increase

tasks.task: Set up Instagram or Pinterest account for ModRun (@modrundesign or similar)
tasks.success_criteria: Account created; 3-5 seed posts before shop launch (behind-the-scenes, design photos)

tasks.task: Post 3-5 product photos on social media on launch day with Etsy shop link
tasks.success_criteria: Launch posts live; Etsy link in bio; product photos tagged with relevant hashtags

tasks.task: Create 'refer a friend' incentive (e.g., '10% off your next order' for reviews)
tasks.success_criteria: Incentive structured and included in thank-you card; tracks referral source

tasks.task: Send thank-you follow-up to first 10 customers (3-5 days after estimated delivery)
tasks.success_criteria: Personal message sent; request for review included; generates first reviews

tasks.task: Respond to every Etsy review (positive and negative) within 48 hours
tasks.success_criteria: All reviews responded to; professional tone; negative reviews addressed with resolution offer

tasks.task: Month 2: Evaluate Etsy Ads ($5-10/day budget to test visibility boost)
tasks.success_criteria: Ads test with $5/day budget; measure cost-per-click and conversion rate before scaling

tasks.task: Month 2: A/B test product title and primary photo on lowest-converting listing
tasks.success_criteria: Test variant created; data collected over 2 weeks; winner identified and applied

tasks.task: Month 2: Review top search terms driving traffic (Etsy Stats → Traffic → Keywords)
tasks.success_criteria: Top keywords identified; listings optimized to include high-traffic terms not yet in tags

tasks.task: Build email list capture (link in Etsy announcement, use ConvertKit free plan)
tasks.success_criteria: Email capture form created; incentive offered (10% off, free design guide); linked from Etsy shop

phases.phase: Month 1 Analysis and Go/No-Go for Month 2 Scaling
phases.description: Quantitative review of all launch phase KPIs. Data-driven decision on scaling.

go_no_go_criteria.proceed_to_scale: ≥5 orders, ≥3% conversion rate, ≥54% gross margin, <5% return rate
go_no_go_criteria.pause_and_optimize: 0-4 orders — review photos/SEO before scaling supplier commitments
go_no_go_criteria.abort_and_pivot: <3 orders after 60 days AND product feedback suggests design issues

tasks.task: Month 1 KPI report: units sold, orders, revenue, COGS, gross margin, return rate
tasks.success_criteria: All KPIs documented; compare to targets in success-criteria section

tasks.task: Validate fulfillment workflow: actual days-to-ship vs. 2-business-day promise
tasks.success_criteria: Average fulfillment time <2 business days; 100% of orders met promise

tasks.task: Validate COGS actuals: compare actual material costs to projections
tasks.success_criteria: Actual COGS within ±10% of projections; any variance explained and corrected

tasks.task: Review customer feedback: Etsy reviews, messages, return reasons
tasks.success_criteria: Feedback summarized; product strengths/issues identified; top improvement opportunity documented

tasks.task: Make supplier commitment decision: lock in wholesale filament based on sales velocity
tasks.success_criteria: Supplier decision made per playbook decision tree; first wholesale order placed if demand supports

tasks.task: Month 2 plan: Set monthly targets, identify top-priority improvements
tasks.success_criteria: Month 2 targets set; action plan documented; resource allocation (time, budget) planned

tasks.task: Second printer evaluation: Decide proceed/defer based on Month 1 run rate
tasks.success_criteria: Printer 2 decision documented: proceed if 30+ units/month run rate; defer otherwise

success_metrics.measurement: Craftybase P&L or manual COGS calculation
Batch QC log: passed / total printed

month_2.note: Assumes wholesale filament unlocked; Pirate Ship commercial rates applied

month_3.note: Assumes Anycubic pallet pricing; approaching break-even on fixed costs at this scale

financial_projections.assumptions: Conservative estimates. AOV based on product mix trending toward bundles. COGS based on $10.49-12.50/kg wholesale filament, $0.05/mailer, $4.50 avg shipping. Etsy fees at 3% + $0.25/order.

risk_register.mitigation: Adjust CadQuery parameters; reprint single test; all 4 phases wait for pass before proceeding

risk_register.risk: Month 1 sales fewer than 3 units in 30 days
risk_register.mitigation: Review product photos first (top Etsy conversion issue); re-research tags with eRank; consider 10-15% promotional pricing for first 30 days; do NOT scale supplier commitments until demand confirmed
Maintain 14-day safety stock; set daily ship time (3 PM cutoff); use USPS pickup if dropoff is difficult
Investigate nozzle, bed leveling, filament moisture; run test print after any significant gap in printing; never ship defective units
ModRun is original CadQuery design — fully compliant with June 2025 rules; maintain design provenance in CadQuery source files; do NOT sell prints of third-party STL files

risk_register.risk: Supplier delays or stock-out (eSUN or Anycubic)
risk_register.mitigation: Maintain 3-week filament buffer; dual-source from Month 2; set up Amazon stock alert for ASIN B0G2KSS613
Strict QA before shipping; respond to returns immediately with replacement; track reason codes to identify design/quality issues early

risk_register.risk: Etsy algorithm penalizes new shop (low visibility)
risk_register.mitigation: Optimize tags and titles from Day 1; drive external traffic (social posts, personal network); respond to all messages within 24hr; maintain 5-star rating; consider Etsy Ads at $5/day after first 10 reviews
